name: Automation Audit
description: Repository-wide scan for manual tasks that should be automated (log rotation, backup retention, manual-step markers, stale reports)
author: Soren (Cast Iron Forge)

inputs.logSizeMB: number (optional, default 10) — logs above this size flagged for rotation
inputs.backupItemThreshold: number (optional, default 10) — folders with more items flagged for retention policy
inputs.manualMarkerPattern: RegExp source (optional, default /\b(TODO|manual)\b/i) — script comments flagged as manual steps

tooltip: Read-only repo scan for automation opportunities: log rotation, backup retention, manual-step markers.
